description: Range-based assertions for code-review quality evals. Scores are non-deterministic; ranges account for AI variance across 3-model consensus.

assertions.name: Overall confidence score in valid range
assertions.notes: Confidence score from 3-model consensus should always be in 0-100 range

assertions.name: Issue count within reasonable bounds
assertions.notes: A ~70 line diff should not produce more than 20 issues -- more suggests hallucination

assertions.name: Sample diff has at least one critical/high issue
assertions.notes: The sample diff contains an intentional null-check bug -- at least one model should flag it as critical/high

assertions.name: False positive rate stays low
assertions.notes: Acceptable style choices should not be flagged as issues -- max 30% false positive rate

assertions.name: Model agreement on the obvious bug
assertions.notes: At least 2 of 3 models should independently identify the null-check bug
